plays.summary: Joe Ryan is at 3.59 xFIP — above average — going up against a near league average TBR lineup (98 wRC+). Tough spot for TBR's bats. Garrett Crochet is at 3.28 xFIP — above average — going up against a near league average ATL lineup (101 wRC+). Tough spot for ATL's bats. 44°F further suppresses scoring. The park (PF 104) is hitter-friendly pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. No line yet — model is at 7.5 runs. Watch for a under when odds open.
